comments: Approved: commit d2fa196 adds only the allowed implementation file tasks/v0.7-m5-b-legacy-tooling-roadmap.md plus the allowed artifacts tasks/v0.7-m5-b-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-m5-b-result-review-packet.json. The roadmap explicitly defines deprecate, retain, and remove criteria for legacy Python scripts in scripts/. No Python scripts were deleted, no existing shell bootstrap scripts were modified, and no changes were made to workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics.
